'''Tomla El''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Ithorian/Legends|Ithorian]] healer who was considered small for his kind.

==Biography==
The chief healer of the [[Cloud-Mother]] herd as of [[12 ABY/Legends|12 ABY]], Tomla El was present when [[Drub McKumb]] attempted to inform [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] of the goings-on at and pertaining to [[Belsavis/Legends|Belsavis]]. He attempted to aid [[Cray Mingla]] in attempting to make the dying [[Nichos Marr/Legends|Nichos Marr]] more [[Human/Legends|Human]] than [[Droid/Legends|droid]].

During the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], Tomla El joined the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic's]] research effort to cure [[Mara Jade Skywalker]]'s [[coomb spore]] infection, and advised the expectant mother on her health while she was pregnant with her son, [[Ben Skywalker|Ben]].

After the [[Battle of Ithor|destruction]] of [[Ithor/Legends|Ithor]], Tomla was working to aid the refugees from Ithor. [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] again tried to contact him when Mara suffered an allergic reaction to the synthetic form of [[Vergere]]'s tears, but was unavailable.

==Appearances==
*[[Children of the Jedi (novel)|''Children of the Jedi'']] {{1st}}
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos I: Hero's Trial]]''
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Edge of Victory II: Rebirth]]'' {{Mo}}
